notes:
Reduce OTA manifest requests to avoid rate limiting (429)

raw.githubusercontent.com rate-limits per IP, and the app checked on
every launch — repeated opens (plus shared carrier NAT IPs) trip a 429.

- Throttle the startup auto-check to once per 6h via a persisted
  timestamp (checkForUpdateOnStartup). The manual Settings check is
  never throttled.
- Send a descriptive User-Agent + Accept on the manifest request
  instead of a bare Dart client.
- Surface 429 distinctly ("server busy, try again in a few minutes")
  in both the Settings snackbar and the diagnostics dialog, so a
  rate-limit reads differently from an unreachable server.

i18n (en/zh/ms): updateRateLimited.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 <noreply@anthropic.com>
